name: context-menu-demo
visual_summary: The Context Menu Demo is a lightweight context menu component that provides a simple way to display a menu of actions triggered by a right-click. It is suitable for use in a variety of scenarios where a short list of actions needs to be presented to the user. The component is customizable and can be used in applications that require a compact and intuitive context menu.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: context-menu-demo
Description: The Context Menu Demo is a lightweight context menu component that provides a simple way to display a menu of actions triggered by a right-click. It is suitable for use in a variety of scenarios where a short list of actions needs to be presented to the user. The component is customizable and can be used in applications that require a compact and intuitive context menu.
Style: minimal, clean
Interactions: animated, clickable
Tags: context menu, right click menu, menu component, dropdown menu, interactive

Requirements:

- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
